testsuite.name: Chrome Headless 148.0.0.0 (Linux 0.0.0)

property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/148.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

testcase.name: Home Navigation Buttons should navigate to login page
Home Navigation Buttons should navigate to register page
Home Support Button should open support email
CentralEmails Creating component Should start newEmail as empty
CentralEmails Creating component Should start showAlert as false
CentralEmails Creating component Should start isCheckingPassword as false
CentralEmails Creating component Should start newPassword as empty
CentralEmails Creating component Should start isLoading as false after load
CentralEmails Creating component Should start passwordResult as empty
CentralEmails Creating component Should start showPasswordModal as false
CentralEmails Creating component Should start showModal as false
CentralEmails Creating component Should create component with success
CentralEmails Creating component Should start showDetailModal as false
CentralEmails toggleExpand() Should collapse if same id clicked again
CentralEmails toggleExpand() Should set expandedBreachId
CentralEmails onAlertClose() Should hide alert
CentralEmails deleteByEmail() Should show success alert after delete
CentralEmails deleteByEmail() Should show error alert when delete fails
CentralEmails deleteByEmail() Should call deleteByEmail on service
CentralEmails logout() Should remove userId from localStorage
CentralEmails logout() Should navigate to /login
CentralEmails addEmail() Should not call service if newEmail is empty
CentralEmails addEmail() Should show error alert when add fails
CentralEmails addEmail() Should show success alert after add
CentralEmails addEmail() Should call addMonitored with userId and email
CentralEmails uniqueEmails getter Should return unique emails only
CentralEmails uniqueEmails getter Should return empty when emails is empty
CentralEmails openDetail() / closeDetail() Should set selectedEmail
CentralEmails openDetail() / closeDetail() Should open detail modal
CentralEmails openDetail() / closeDetail() Should reset selectedEmail on close
CentralEmails openDetail() / closeDetail() Should close detail modal
CentralEmails openDetail() / closeDetail() Should filter selectedBreaches by email
CentralEmails openDetail() / closeDetail() Should reset selectedBreaches on close
CentralEmails formatCount() Should format thousands
CentralEmails formatCount() Should return number as string
CentralEmails formatCount() Should return — for null
CentralEmails formatCount() Should format millions
CentralEmails breachCount() Should return correct breach count
CentralEmails breachCount() Should return 0 when no breaches
CentralEmails ngOnInit() Should populate emails after load
CentralEmails ngOnInit() Should call loadEmails on init
CentralEmails openModal() / closeModal() Should open modal
CentralEmails openModal() / closeModal() Should close modal
CentralEmails openModal() / closeModal() Should reset passwordResult when close modal
CentralEmails openModal() / closeModal() Should reset newPassword when close modal
CentralEmails openModal() / closeModal() Should reset newEmail when open modal
CentralEmails checkPassword() Should set passwordResult when password is safe
CentralEmails checkPassword() Should set isCheckingPassword to false after success
CentralEmails checkPassword() Should set isCheckingPassword to false after error
CentralEmails checkPassword() Should set passwordResult to error message when service fails
CentralEmails checkPassword() Should set passwordResult when password is leaked
CentralEmails checkPassword() Should call accountService.checkPassword with newPassword
CentralEmails checkPassword() Should not call service if newPassword is empty
CentralEmails openPasswordModal() / closePasswordModal() Should reset passwordResult when close password modal
CentralEmails openPasswordModal() / closePasswordModal() Should reset newPassword when close password modal
CentralEmails openPasswordModal() / closePasswordModal() Should reset newPassword when open password modal
CentralEmails openPasswordModal() / closePasswordModal() Should close password modal
CentralEmails openPasswordModal() / closePasswordModal() Should reset passwordResult when open password modal
CentralEmails openPasswordModal() / closePasswordModal() Should open password modal
ForgotPassword should create
Register Structure of template Should have the button Registrar
Register Structure of template Should have the button Entrar
Register Structure of template Should have the logo in application
Register Structure of template Should have the confirm field
Register Structure of template Should have the name field
Register Structure of template Should have the email field
Register Structure of template Should show title "SAFE ACCOUNTS"
Register Structure of template Should have the password field
Register toggleSenha() Should be active toggle when click in .hide-icon
Register toggleSenha() The field confirm password should be text when show password = true
Register toggleSenha() Should change show password of true to false
Register toggleSenha() The field password should be text when show password = true
Register toggleSenha() The field password should be password when show password = false
Register toggleSenha() The field confirm password should be password when show password = false
Register toggleSenha() Should change show password of false to true
Register toggleSenha() Should active toggle when click in .show-icon
Register Navigation (routerLink) Button Entrar should have routerLink="/login"
Register Verifyng Alert Window open Should show error alert if name is too short
Register Verifyng Alert Window open Should show error alert if name has numbers or symbols
Register Verifyng Alert Window open Should show error alert if required fields are empty
Register Verifyng Alert Window open Should show error alert if passwords do not match
Register Verifyng Alert Window open Should show error alert if email is invalid or has wrong domain
Register Verifyng Alert Window open Should show error alert if password lacks complexity
Register Alert behavior Should hide alert when onAlertClose is called
Register Alert behavior Should not navigate when close alert with error
Register Alert behavior Should navigate to /login when close alert with success
Register isLoading Should set isLoading to false after save success
Register isLoading Should set isLoading to false after save error
Register isLoading Should start isLoading as false
Register isLoading Should set isLoading to true when save starts
Register Reactive Form Binding Should update email control
Register Reactive Form Binding Should update password control
Register Reactive Form Binding Should update name control
Register save() Should handle with error when save user
Register save() Should call userService.saveUser with form data
Register save() Should show alert with type success when save with success
Register save() Should call save() when click in button Registrar
Register save() Should show alert with type error when save fails
Register Creating component Should create component with success
Register Creating component Should start form with empty values
Register Creating component Should start with mostrarSenha = false
Sum Util should sum two numbers
ValidateToken should create
Alert should create
App should create the app
Login Navigation (routerLink) The button "registrar-se" should have routerLink="/register"
Login Navigation (routerLink) The button "senha" should have routerLink="/forgot-password"
Login Navigation (routerLink) The button "Entrar" should have routerLink="/login"
Login Creating component should to init with show password in status with false
Login Creating component should creating with success
Login Estrutura do template Should own the field the button "registrar-se"
Login Estrutura do template Should own the field the button forget password
Login Estrutura do template should own the field "Entrar"
Login Estrutura do template should own the field email
Login Estrutura do template should own the field "password"
Login Estrutura do template should show title "SAFE ACCOUNTS"
Login Estrutura do template Should the own the logo of aplication
Login toggleSenha() Should display the .show-icon and hide the .hide-icon when showPassword = false
Login toggleSenha() Should to back the kind type input to password when show password = false
Login toggleSenha() Should to call toggleSenha() and to change when click in .hide-icon
Login toggleSenha() Should display the .show-icon and hide the .hide-icon when showPassword = true.
Login toggleSenha() Should display to change the kind of type input to text when show password = true
Login toggleSenha() Should to call toggleSenha() and to change the state the click in .show-icon
Login toggleSenha() Should alternate show password of false to true
Login toggleSenha() Should alternate show password of true to false
NewPassword should create
User should create
UserService should be created

testsuite.system-out: Chrome Headless 148.0.0.0 (Linux 0.0.0) ERROR: 'Error: Name too short.' ,Chrome Headless 148.0.0.0 (Linux 0.0.0) ERROR: 'Error: Invalid Name.' ,Chrome Headless 148.0.0.0 (Linux 0.0.0) ERROR: 'Error: All fields are required.' ,Chrome Headless 148.0.0.0 (Linux 0.0.0) ERROR: 'Error: Passwords do not match.' ,Chrome Headless 148.0.0.0 (Linux 0.0.0) ERROR: 'Error: The email must be valid.' ,Chrome Headless 148.0.0.0 (Linux 0.0.0) ERROR: 'Error: Password fields must meet the requirements: 12 characters, 1 uppercase letter, 1 number and 1 symbol.' ,Chrome Headless 148.0.0.0 (Linux 0.0.0) ERROR: 'Error saving user:', 'erro' ,Chrome Headless 148.0.0.0 (Linux 0.0.0) ERROR: 'Error saving user:', 'erro'
